excerpt: Read the Affordable Care Act (ACA) enacted on March 23, 2010. Several versions available.
content:
You can read the Affordable Care Act (ACA) enacted on March 23, 2010.

Read the full law

The law has 2 parts: the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act and the Health Care and Education Reconciliation Act.

Full Text of the Affordable Care Act and Reconciliation Act (PDF – 2.6 MB) This is not the official version, and we provide it for your convenience.

Official certified full-text of the laws in PDF form:

  • Certified full-text version: Affordable Care Act (PDF – 2.41 MB)
  • Certified full-text version: Reconciliation Act (PDF – 257 KB)

Summary and certified full-text version in HTML (web page) format:

  • HTML version of the Affordable Care Act
  • HTML Version of the Reconciliation Act

Learn more about your rights and protections.
